scripts.build:lib: pnpm build:lib:url-state && ng build angular-async-state && ng build angular-lookups && ng build angular-query-form && ng build angular-optimistic-state && ng build angular-permissions
scripts.test:lib: pnpm test:lib:url-state && pnpm test:lib:async-state && pnpm test:lib:lookups && pnpm test:lib:query-form && pnpm test:lib:optimistic-state && pnpm test:lib:permissions
scripts.test:ci: ng test angular-url-state --watch=false && ng test angular-async-state --watch=false && ng test angular-lookups --watch=false && ng test angular-query-form --watch=false && ng test angular-optimistic-state --watch=false && ng test angular-permissions --watch=false && ng test demo-angular --watch=false
scripts.verify:package: pnpm verify:package:url-state && pnpm verify:package:async-state && pnpm verify:package:lookups && pnpm verify:package:query-form && pnpm verify:package:optimistic-state && pnpm verify:package:permissions
scripts.verify:package:url-state: node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('.artifacts', { recursive: true });" && pnpm --dir dist/angular-url-state pack --pack-destination ../../.artifacts
scripts.verify:package:async-state: node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('.artifacts', { recursive: true });" && pnpm --dir dist/angular-async-state pack --pack-destination ../../.artifacts
scripts.verify:package:lookups: node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('.artifacts', { recursive: true });" && pnpm --dir dist/angular-lookups pack --pack-destination ../../.artifacts
scripts.verify:package:query-form: node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('.artifacts', { recursive: true });" && pnpm --dir dist/angular-query-form pack --pack-destination ../../.artifacts
scripts.verify:package:optimistic-state: node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('.artifacts', { recursive: true });" && pnpm --dir dist/angular-optimistic-state pack --pack-destination ../../.artifacts
scripts.verify:package:permissions: node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('.artifacts', { recursive: true });" && pnpm --dir dist/angular-permissions pack --pack-destination ../../.artifacts
